chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D – 1069 of 2020 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh case: 1. For orders on CMA No.4966/2020 (Urgency): 2. For orders on CMA No.4967/2020 (Exemption): 3. For orders on CMA No.4968/2020 (Stay): 4. For hearing of main case: 18.02.2020: Mr. Tariq Ali Jahrani, advocate for the petitioner. ----------- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just exceptions. 3 & 4. Vide order dated 28.08.2019 (page 85), petitioner was dismissed from service with immediate effect on the grounds alleged in the said order. It is stated that the said order is bad in law as the petitioner was not allowed to participate in the enquiry proceedings as he was in jail. Learned counsel has conceded that the appeal filed by the petitioner against the said order before the President of the respondent-bank is pending. The grievance of the petitioner is that the appeal is not being decided by the appellate authority despite passage of considerable time. He further states that the petitioner would be satisfied if a direction is given to the appellate authority to decide his appeal expeditiously. Without touching the merits or demerits of the case, the appellate authority of the respondent-bank is directed to decide the petitioner’s appeal within thirty days from today strictly in accordance with law and after affording proper opportunity of hearing to him. Issue notice to respondents for compliance. The petition and listed application stand disposed of in the above terms with no order as to costs. J U D G E J U D G E Ndm
